description_long: This shotgun features a long, metallic barrel with a prominent scope mounted on top, suggesting it is designed for precision shooting. The body is composed of a mix of metallic and synthetic materials, with a stock that appears reinforced and ergonomically shaped for shoulder support. The coloration includes a blend of brass, steel, and dark synthetic elements, giving it a rugged, tactical appearance. The trigger assembly is protected by a rounded, robust trigger guard, and there are visible mechanical components such as a bolt and magazine area. The fore-end is detailed with metallic tubing and structural reinforcements, while the buttstock has a textured, padded end for recoil absorption. Overall, the shotgun is visually complex, with a combination of functional and decorative elements that suggest both durability and advanced engineering.
description: A long, metallic shotgun with a mounted scope, reinforced stock, and a mix of brass, steel, and synthetic materials, designed for precision and durability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the scope, barrel, and detailed stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, scope alignment, and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with slight differences in visible mechanical details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, trigger guard, and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single long barrel with a mounted scope and visible metallic ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, robust trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
